image.description: The style reference image whose visual style will be applied to the output.

prompt.description: Text describing the subject and composition of the output image.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.

fidelity.description: Controls how strongly the style of the reference image influences the output. Higher values produce outputs closer to the reference style.

seed.description: A value to control randomness in generation.

output_format.description: The output format of the generated image.
